daily_summary.headline: Exciting Launches and Aurora Opportunities Await!

top_events.title: Falcon Heavy | ViaSat-3 F3 (ViaSat-3 Asia-Pacific)
top_events.description: A significant launch by SpaceX's Falcon Heavy, delivering the ViaSat-3 F3 satellite to geostationary transfer orbit, enhancing global communication capabilities.
top_events.action: Watch live on SpaceX's official webcast.

top_events.title: Soyuz-5 | Demo Flight
top_events.description: A demonstration flight for Russia's new Soyuz-5 launch vehicle, marking a significant step in Russian space capabilities.
top_events.action: Follow updates on Russian space agency's official channels.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A G1 geomagnetic storm could make auroras visible above 65° latitude. Best viewing time is around midnight UTC.
top_events.action: Check local conditions and prepare for possible aurora sightings.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
